name: Parsnips Beans
recipeIngredient: Cooked brown basmati rice for serving
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the parsnips and slice them thinly.
2. Place the sliced parsnips in a microwave-safe casserole dish with at least 4 quarts capacity, adding water to cover the bottom of the dish by about one tablespoon.
3. Microwave on high until the parsnip slices can be easily pierced with a fork (approximately five minutes), stirring occasionally for even cooking.
4. Add the rinsed and drained black beans to the casserole.
5. Place the chopped bok choy over the top of the beans.
6. If necessary, add a little more water so that it covers the bottom of the dish.
7. Continue microwaving until the bok choy is wilted and the stems are tender-crisp.
8. Stir the mixture to combine all flavors.
9. Serve hot over cooked brown basmati rice. Allow each person to add their desired amount of teriyaki sauce or other spices.
The natural flavors of the vegetables make this dish appealing, so it's best to keep the seasoning simple.
